issues.description: TrashFromHand should be optional ("You may trash"), but DSL structure doesn't reflect the optional nature with a conditional check. The action needs to be wrapped in a condition or use optional semantics.

Missing condition: "If your Leader has the {Blackbeard Pirates} type" must be enforced. Condition should be LeaderHasType with type 'Blackbeard Pirates'. Currently thenActions execute unconditionally after trash.
DrawCard should only execute if the Leader type condition is met. Currently structured as automatic consequence of trash action, not gated by Leader type check.
PowerBoost target should limit to 1 Character ("up to 1"), but ChooseOpponentCharacter without maxCount constraint. Should include maxCount: 1.
Duration "during this turn" should map to "DuringYourTurn", not "EndOfTurn". These have different mechanical meanings.
